sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114037" key="ximairoqu/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῐμαιρο-θύτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114037.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goat-sacrificer,</tr_> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1458.tlg001:300" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">300</biblScope> </bibl> (Id.).</sense> </entryFree>
